title: A round UFO with strong lights spotted hovering over Brasília [1996]
excerpt: MAY 25th, 1996. Time: 18h50. Duration: 40 minutes. Six people from the window of an apartment in Brasilia, Distrito Federal, observed an unidentified flying object “the size of an airplane”, with a “round shape and strong white lights. text_preview: MAY 25th, 1996. Time: 18h50. Duration: 40 minutes. Six people from the window of an apartment in Brasilia, Distrito Federal, observed an unidentified flying object “the size of an airplane”, with a “round shape and strong white lights. According to one of the witnesses who reported to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the UFO remained stationary at an altitude of approximately 5km, and it was observed from a distance [horizontal] of about 15km. Also according to the witness, the UFO remained in the southern sector of the city and then moved in a straight path. The sighting took p
summary: On 25 May 1996 six people in a Brasília apartment watched a round airplane-sized UFO with strong white lights hover stationary at ~5 km altitude for 40 minutes before departing.
